transcript.text: Redwood National and State Parks at 3,150 feet. I think that's the ocean. I feel like I'm bike touring through Europe, getting lost on these boats. Look at this out, the sun is like completely blotted out.

Redwood National Park is right down there, and that's Redwood Creek. This is Redwood Creek Overlook. It's like maybe that's where the bears and stuff live and the Bigfoot. I was in, I camped in Humboldt County last night. So, thick, thick, thick, thick, thick. They never put the thing up on here, but.
